new_text: Eclipse-agave audit complete (2026-03-02). PROGRAMS (3, all feature-gated on PROJECTDAWN_FEATURE_ID): Treasury 6 instructions (discriminator=0x54, 66 bytes, 53 tests); Governance 8 instructions, 6 ProposalTypes, discriminators G=0x47/P=0x50/V=0x56, 74 tests; DevRew 8 instructions, ProgramRevenueConfig discriminator=0x52, EpochFeeTracker=0x45, 65 tests. FEE MARKET: 5 files, EIP-1559 u128, min=5k/max=50M, BlockFeeState in Bank via RwLock<BlockFeeState> line 985, 44 tests. PASSIVE STAKING: tiers 1-5 rate_fraction_bp=500/1000/2000/3000/5000, lockup=0/14/36/72/144 epochs, permanent=12000 bps; vote_weight_bps at offset 82 (u16 LE). TOTAL TESTS: 236. TOKEN: DAWN. CONSENSUS: L2 Sequencer (Eclipse). FORMULAS: epoch_reward=stake*rate/(10000*146); early_unlock=5*stake*rate_bp/10000; fee_split linear over 1460 epochs [1000,0,4500,4500]→[2500,2500,2500,2500]. FEATURE: 2cXMYQHQJeooKZv3q4F45mNLh5y5HMKvTfs5Rp3qtc8i.

Eclipse-agave governance program spec. ID: Governance1111...1111. INSTRUCTIONS (8, bincode): InitializeGovernance/CreateProposal/CastVote/ExecuteProposal/CancelProposal/VetoProposal/ActivateGovernance/UpdateConfig. PROPOSAL TYPES (6): ParameterChange{param_id,new_value}/TreasurySpend{recipient,amount,memo}/EmergencyUnlock{target}@80%/ProgramUpgrade{program_id,buffer}/FeatureToggle{feature_id,enabled}/TextProposal. VOTE: For=0/Against=1/Abstain=2/Veto=3. STATUS (9): Draft/Active/Passed/Rejected/Vetoed/Timelocked/Executed/Cancelled/Expired. STATE: GovernanceConfig 104 bytes discriminator=1 (is_active=false,authority,thresholds); Proposal 512 bytes discriminator=2; VoteRecord 58 bytes discriminator=3. DEFAULTS: threshold=50k SOL, period=7 epochs, quorum=30%, pass=50%, veto=33.3%, timelock=2, emergency=80%. VOTE WEIGHT: 30d=0.10x/90d=0.20x/180d=0.30x/360d=0.50x/permanent=1.50x; formula: amount*bps/10000 (u128). Pre-activation: authority-only, proposals skip voting→Timelocked→Executed. SDK 2.2.0: try_borrow_instruction_account(tx_ctx,idx), solana_log_collector::ic_msg, bincode::deserialize.

Eclipse-agave vs TRv1-clean (2026-03-02 verified). EIP-1559: eclipse-agave IMPLEMENTED (fee-market crate, BlockFeeState) but NOT wired into Bank tx validation — INTEGRATION GAP. GOVERNANCE: IMPLEMENTED (8 instructions, 6 proposal types, builtins registered) but 0 unit tests. TREASURY: IMPLEMENTED (6 instructions incl. GovernanceWithdraw, bincode, fee_distribution.rs:87-113 deposits via deposit_fees()). DEVREW: IMPLEMENTED (8 instructions, PDA-based, credit_developer_fees_direct() in fee_distribution.rs:186-266). 4-WAY FEE SPLIT: fully wired in fee_distribution.rs:62-119 (projectdawn_enabled check, split_fees(), treasury+dev distribution). GAPS vs TRv1: (1) EIP-1559 not wired into Bank tx validation; (2) no BlockFeeState in Bank struct; (3) no per-tx base fee validation; (4) no unit tests in custom programs. TEST COUNTS: projectdawn_config.rs 9, fee_distribution.rs 9+, fee-market calculator 4+, programs 0.

Eclipse-agave Phase 2 treasury findings (2026-03-02). HANDOFF: /home/crab/projects/chainovi/ECLIPSE_AGAVE_HANDOFF.md (473 lines, 5 phases). EXISTING: fee_distribution.rs 4-way split COMPLETE (burn/validator/treasury/developer, fallback burn, 447 lines, 9 tests); projectdawn_config.rs 350 lines (fee split interpolation, staking tiers, 8 unit tests). SDK 2.2.0 DIFFS: try_borrow_instruction_account(tx_ctx,idx); solana_log_collector::ic_msg; bincode::deserialize; solana_type_overrides; feature gating via runtime enable_feature_id (not compile-time cfg). TREASURY SPEC: ID Treasury11111...1111, bincode, TreasuryState 66 bytes discriminator=0x54; 5 instructions (Initialize/DepositFees permissionless/Withdraw authority-only/UpdateAuthority/GetBalance). PHASE 5 INTEGRATION: replace raw deposit_fees() at fee_distribution.rs:83 with CPI TreasuryInstruction::DepositFees; replace dev deposits with CPI DevRew::CreditDeveloperFees; add BlockFeeState to Bank for EIP-1559. REPO: branch projectdawn-l2.

ProjectDawn test coverage (2026-02-09). TESTED: (1) fee split config — 9 unit tests (launch/maturity/midpoint/no-rounding-loss/tiers/penalty/epoch reward/determinism); (2) fee_distribution — 11 tests (deposit_or_burn, overflow, invalid owner, rent, 4-way split assertions); (3) flat 5% APY in bank/tests.rs; (4) fee split 4-way + epoch transition. PARTIALLY TESTED: passive staking tiers (config math only, no stake_state.rs function tests); early unlock (penalty math only, no actual function test); developer rewards (no direct tests for distribute_developer_fees(), no fee_attribution/upgrade_authority tests). NOT TESTED: permanent_lock() in stake_state.rs (ZERO — PERMANENTLY_LOCKED flag, dual-sig requirement, 120% boost); governance_unlock stub (returns error, untested); genesis treasury seeding; StakeFlags PERMANENTLY_LOCKED/passive_tier bits (existing tests only cover MUST_FULLY_ACTIVATE...); zero integration tests for any ProjectDawn feature.

TRv1 deep tech (2026-03-02). REPO: github.com/sjxcrypto/TRv1, v4.0.0-alpha.0, 151 workspace members. PROGRAMS (4): DevRew (1000 CU min, 7d cooldown, 10% epoch cap, 45%→25% share); PassiveStake (6 tiers+permanent, 500-12000 bps, early unlock=5x tier rate, burns not treasury); Treasury (5-of-7 multisig→governance, ID Treasury11111); Governance (disabled at launch, 6 proposal types, 80% emergency supermajority). CONSENSUS: Tendermint BFT — Propose/Prevote/Precommit/Commit, 1s blocks, 6s deterministic finality, stake-weighted round-robin, slashing double-sign, crates: consensus-bft/consensus-net/votor. FEE MARKET: EIP-1559 min=5k/max=50M/target=50%/denom=8, launch 10/0/45/45→maturity 25/25/25/25. BRANDING: trv1-validator/trv1-genesis/etc, pure SVM no EVM. DESIGN: flat 5% per-coin staking, validator-only slashing, 200 active validator cap, deterministic finality, tiered storage RAM→NVMe→cold. HARDWARE: Lite 32GB/8core/500GB → Standard 64GB/16core/1TB → Performance 128GB/32core/2TB. STATUS: pre-alpha, ready internal testnet.

All use BankClient+process_transaction() realistic flow.

Treasury comparison TRv1 vs eclipse-agave (2026-03-02). TRV1 (/home/crab/projects/chainovi/TRv1/programs/treasury/): TreasuryState 66 bytes discriminator=0x54, authority (5-of-7 multisig→governance), total_deposited/withdrawn u64, last_deposit/withdrawal_slot; 5 instructions (Initialize/DepositFees permissionless/Withdraw authority-signed/UpdateAuthority/GetBalance); lamports held directly in state account; 24 processor.rs + 17 state.rs unit tests. ECLIPSE-AGAVE: runtime-only primary — fee_distribution.rs deposits via Bank.deposit_fees(treasury_pubkey), NO withdrawal mechanism, no authority model, no accounting counters; stub program at programs/treasury/ unused. KEY GAPS: (1) no withdrawal — funds accumulate but unspendable; (2) no authority mechanism; (3) no on-chain accounting; (4) ownership unclear. TRANSITION: eclipse-agave 1825 epochs (~5yr) vs TRv1 912 epochs.

TRv1 vs eclipse-agave developer rewards (2026-03-02). TRV1 (full on-chain, programs/developer-rewards/): 8 instructions, ProgramRevenueConfig PDA + EpochFeeTracker PDA, anti-gaming (1000 CU min, 7d cooldown, 10% epoch cap), multi-recipient splits up to 10 via RevenueSplit{recipient,share_bps}, ClaimDeveloperFees permissionless, 36+ unit tests. Fees accumulate on-chain (auditable, claimable anytime). ECLIPSE-AGAVE (runtime-only, NO on-chain program): distribute_developer_fees() in fee_distribution.rs — reads program_fee_attribution HashMap<Pubkey,u64>, calculates proportional share, pays directly to upgrade authority pubkey in-slot; no claim mechanism, no on-chain record, no anti-gaming (no CU threshold, no cooldown, no epoch cap); fallback to treasury/burn if deposit fails. KEY DIFF: TRv1 fees auditable on-chain+claimable; eclipse-agave deposits in-slot with no claiming, splitting, or anti-gaming. ATTRIBUTION: Bank.program_fee_attribution RwLock<HashMap<Pubkey,u64>>.

Eclipse-agave integration test porting (2026-02-09). PORTED from /home/crab/agave/ to /home/crab/eclipse-agave/: (1) projectdawn_permanent.rs — 11 tests all passing; (2) projectdawn_passive.rs — 4 tests; (3) projectdawn_fees.rs — 5 tests. CHANGES NEEDED: (A) bank.rs: made projectdawn_config/projectdawn_enabled pub; (B) runtime/Cargo.toml: added solana-stake-interface to dev-deps; (C) imports: stake_instruction::permanent_lock/passive_lock/early_unlock → solana_stake_interface::instruction; (D) calculation.rs: REMOVED projectdawn_enabled guard from 120% bonus+passive stake check — bonus always applies to PERMANENTLY_LOCKED regardless of feature gate; (E) distribution.rs: assertion relaxed to reward_lamports>=delegation_increase (not ==) for non-compounding. KEY LESSON: 120% permanent lock bonus and passive stake NOT gated by projectdawn_enabled — feature gate controls fee distribution+instruction routing only; once PERMANENTLY_LOCKED, bonus always applies via direct StakeFlags check.
